Company History:  
Ngomusolethu (Pty) Ltd is team of devoted experts of solar systems, that operates in variety of services 
within green energy such as designing, installation,

commission and maintained of solar systems. Our 
target market is limited to none, we render our services to the following market scale; residential, 
commercial, agricultural and industrial. We offer services on credit only when dealing or operating 
through major institutions, thereby minimising our risk exposure. 
 
We are focused on owning a brand that we can develop ourselves. We outsource the skills of the 
private third-party entrepreneurs/professionals to take our services to market, bu

t we always remain 
loyal to our own abilities. 
 
Background: 
Ngomusolethu (Pty) Ltd is a black owned company. The company is based in Middelburg (MP), it was 
established under the entrepreneurial spirit of its directors, Mr S.J Skosana and Miss N.L.H Zulu in 2020. 
 
Ngomusolethu (Pty) Ltd is an innovative company specializing in the field of green energy (solar 
systems) We have dynamic management team ensuring the best quality service delivery to all its 
clients. It also serves as a vehic

le to empower and develop more individuals in its area of operations. 
Our enterprise employs relevantly qualified and suitable candidates who have the necessary skills in all 
our service offering and product suite field stated above. 
 
As a South African company, we work with local professional companies in joint venture projects 
through our strategic relationships with them. 
 
We are amongst the few black-owned solar system companies that are truly virtual, making 
our presence and bluepri

nt to be national, with global capabilities. 
At Ngomusolethu (Pty) Ltd we pride ourselves on recruiting and retaining the top talent and

cust

omers benefit from the fact that their procurement scorecard is enhanced, as Ngomusolethu (Pty)

creation 
 
Environment:

ork.

omers, or our company.
